title: Mannequin Essentials
description: Mannequin Essentials is a ready-to-go Minecraft modpack built around Mannequin, with performance and quality-of-life mods for easy thumbnail creation.
body:
## Welcome to Mannequin Essentials ✷

[![Manequin Essentials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A1y0NEDH/images/6372a3676f79ff85b47ba0551d3b4670e47ce15e.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/origins)

**Mannequin Essentials** is a ready-to-go Minecraft modpack built around [Mannequin](https://modrinth.com/mod/mannequin-mod). It gives you everything you need to pose, stage, and capture thumbnails right in-game.

On top of that, it comes with handy performance and quality-of-life mods so you can jump straight into creating without fussing with installs or compatibility. Whether you’re just starting out or making content every day, **Mannequin Essentials** makes thumbnail creation simple, smooth, and chill.

### **✷ Features**

* **Core performance mods** (Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast, and more)
* Updated to support the **latest** versions of Mannequin
* **Performance-focused** with extra QOL features
* Vanilla gameplay and general look **preserved**
* **Great template** for adding your own favorite QOL mods

### **✷ Installation**

1. Download **Mannequin Essentials** from Modrinth
2. Use a Fabric-compatible launcher (Modrinth App, Prism, GDLauncher, or MultiMC)
3. Run and enjoy an optimized thumbnail creation experience

[![Support Notice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e66cbe18d07fb3d00265259782feae9469c9a91.png)](https://discord.gg/mannequin)

[![origins banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1449f48133904a4d9b6ac854f2214440af5cd2b.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/origins)
